/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcustom_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libcustom_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/custom_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/custom_msgs/msg/detail/open_space__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/racecar/racecar_ws/src/custom_msgs/build/custom_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libcustom_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
